creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=148384

Maintainer & submitter timeouts; I suggest the following patch, and will
commit it by the weekend if there're no objections.

--- merkaartor.patch begins here ---
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/amdmi3/projects/freebsd/FreeBSD.cvs/ports/astro/merkaartor/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.10
diff -u -r1.10 Makefile
--- Makefile	28 Mar 2010 06:30:36 -0000	1.10
+++ Makefile	27 Jul 2010 23:35:25 -0000
@@ -6,25 +6,27 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	merkaartor
-PORTVERSION=	0.14
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	0.16.1
 CATEGORIES=	astro
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.merkaartor.org/downloads/source/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.merkaartor.be/attachments/download/2/
 
 MAINTAINER=	slaven@rezic.de
 COMMENT=	An openstreetmap mapping program
 
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/include/boost/concept_check.hpp:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-libs
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 
 USE_QT_VER=	4
 QT_COMPONENTS=	qmake_build uic_build moc_build rcc_build \
 		gui network svg webkit xml imageformats script scripttools
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 
 QMAKEFLAGS=	PREFIX=${PREFIX}
 
-MAN1=		merkaartor.1
-
 OPTIONS=	GEOIMAGE "Enable geotagged images (needs exiv2)" on
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
@@ -48,7 +50,4 @@
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${CONFIGURE_ENV} \
 		${QMAKE} ${QMAKEFLAGS}
 
-post-install:
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/debian/merkaartor.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/amdmi3/projects/freebsd/FreeBSD.cvs/ports/astro/merkaartor/distinfo,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -u -r1.4 distinfo
--- distinfo	30 Dec 2009 12:59:00 -0000	1.4
+++ distinfo	6 Jul 2010 13:01:35 -0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (merkaartor-0.14.tar.bz2) = eaba052e083c796fcc9ad8edebc19dec
-SHA256 (merkaartor-0.14.tar.bz2) = efc9da3da199ba7899d1c8ebba8092b7d5d23288e108791037f3db487a1819b8
-SIZE (merkaartor-0.14.tar.bz2) = 5121445
+MD5 (merkaartor-0.16.1.tar.bz2) = 2da9635619df7251cd16da72970b250d
+SHA256 (merkaartor-0.16.1.tar.bz2) = c1ca13a037060c367e93d895a92f5de8da344a753d43bd5119de15473e918a4b
+SIZE (merkaartor-0.16.1.tar.bz2) = 5794456
Index: pkg-descr
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/amdmi3/projects/freebsd/FreeBSD.cvs/ports/astro/merkaartor/pkg-descr,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -r1.1 pkg-descr
--- pkg-descr	15 Jan 2009 01:44:35 -0000	1.1
+++ pkg-descr	27 Jul 2010 23:36:10 -0000
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@
 
 It is based on Qt4.
 
-WWW: http://www.merkaartor.org/
+WWW: http://merkaartor.be/
Index: pkg-plist
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/amdmi3/projects/freebsd/FreeBSD.cvs/ports/astro/merkaartor/pkg-plist,v
retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -r1.2 pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist	30 Dec 2009 12:59:00 -0000	1.2
+++ pkg-plist	27 Jul 2010 23:14:49 -0000
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 bin/merkaartor
+lib/merkaartor/plugins/background/libMWalkingPapersBackgroundPlugin.so
 lib/merkaartor/plugins/background/libMYahooBackgroundPlugin.so
+lib/merkaartor/plugins/background/libMYahooTiledBackgroundPlugin.so
 lib/merkaartor/plugins/styles/libskulpture.so
 share/applications/merkaartor.desktop
 share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/merkaartor.png
@@ -16,8 +18,12 @@
 %%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_ja.qm
 %%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_nl.qm
 %%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_pl.qm
+%%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_pt.qm
+%%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_pt_BR.qm
 %%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_ru.qm
+%%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_sk.qm
 %%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_sv.qm
+%%NLS%%%%DATADIR%%/translations/merkaartor_uk.qm
 %%DATADIR%%/world_background.osb
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/translations
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
